style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura with jagged, elongated shadow tendrils twisting around Hitmonlee's form, slow drifting mist particles swirling in eerie purple eddies. Cold blue-white ghost luminescence pulses through its translucent body, casting distorted reflections in the misty air. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
